content: Phase 2.1 Backend — TOTP 2FA: pyotp + qrcode, models, routes (setup/enable/disable/verify), enforcement at login
Phase 2.2 Backend — Retainers (Stripe Payment Links): models, CRUD routes for plans + per-athlete assignments
Phase 2.3 Backend — E-sign covenants: models, routes (create/send/sign), PDF stamping, audit
Phase 2.4 Backend — Mock email delivery: log to console + outbox UI, polished UI invite copy
Phase 2.5 Frontend — 2FA setup UI (Account + Settings) and 2FA challenge step in Login
Phase 2.6 Frontend — Admin Retainers + Covenants pages, Portal Retainer + Covenant signing UI
Phase 2.7 Frontend — Inline-edit overlay on public site for users with edit_content (click-to-edit text, image swap, reorder, discard/publish)
Phase 2.8 Testing agent end-to-end + bug fixes + finish
